mapper.select: select b.*, a.user_id from agent_bind_info a left join data_info b on a.agent_code = b.agent_code and a.domain = b.domain where b.data_date = #{date} and a.user_id < 0 and pause_state = 0
select config_value from sys_config where config_key = concat('convert_config_', #{botId})
select config_value from sys_config where config_key = concat('renew_config_', #{botId})
